name: Eagle Flight MFB
description: Eagle Flight Micro Finance Bank Limited was birthed with the Vision to be the biggest and the best in the scheme of things. Being one of the fastest growing Banks in the Micro Finance industry that is constantly and rapidly evolving, we are proud to inform you of our achievement recorded within this short space of time.

We provide
**industry-focused**
services for public
& private clients.
[Discover more](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/)
### [Current Corporate Acct](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/accounts)
Our Corporate Current Account offers a checking account that allows you to carry out routine banking transactions with third parties.
[Find Out More](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/accounts)
![](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/images/EFMB_Accounts_-_Current_Corporate.jpg)
### [Saving Acct](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/accounts)
These accounts are maintained by retail financial institutions that pay interest but can not be used directly as money (e.g. writing a cheque).
[Find Out More](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/accounts)
![](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/images/EFMB_Accounts_-_Savings.jpg)
### [Loan Acct](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/accounts)
We structure credit facilities to meet our customers specific business needs and add significant value to our customers businesses.
[Find Out More](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/accounts)
![](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/images/EFMB_Accounts_-_Loans.jpg)
## Bank With Ease!
We understand how challenging your business activities and job routines can be. So the last thing we want to is make banking another daunting activity. Bank with ease via our mobile app.
[ ![](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/images/E_Channel_banner.png) ](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/)
[ ![](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/images/Eagle_Flight_E-Channel.png) ](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/)
## Why Bank with Us?
![industry_finance](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/images/lead/blurb/industry_other.svg)
### [Constant Training](javascript:void\(0\))
We routinely subject our team members to training on industry best-practices.
![industry_travel](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/images/lead/blurb/industry_travel.svg)
### [Customer-centric](javascript:void\(0\))
We reinforce the idea of "customer is king" in our business relationship.
![life_healthcare](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/images/lead/blurb/industry_life_healthcare.svg)
### [Transparent Process](javascript:void\(0\))
We do our best to create an environment of clarity in our dealings.
![industry-tech](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/images/lead/blurb/industry_finance.svg)
### [Tech-driven Process](javascript:void\(0\))
Technology has made a whole world of good. So we employ it in our processes.
### Featured Product Offerings
![](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/images/EFMB_-_Eagle_Oil_Boom.jpg)
###### Eagle Oil Boom
This account is well suited for the independent Oil Marketers. Customers Target: A minimum balance of ₦200.000.00 is required.
[Find Out More](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/products)
![](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/images/EFMB_-_Eagle_E_Go_Better.jpg)
###### Eagle E Go Better
This account enables you to start a daily savings with minimum of N500 only, this is to help you achieve your set target.
[Find Out More](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/products)
![](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/images/EFMB_-_Eagle_Wealth_Scheme.jpg)
###### Eagle Wealth Scheme
This is a business expansion and investment scheme enabling you to acquire wealth from your savings. An opening balance of ₦2,000 is required.
[Find Out More](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/products)
![](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/images/EFMB_-_Eagle_VIP_Gold_Account.jpg)
###### Eagle VIP Gold
Eagle VIP Gold account is a well selected product offering for unique personalities in the nation. An opening balance of ₦300,000 is required.
[Find Out More](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/products)
×
![](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/popup/pop.jpg)
#### [Got need of a banking parther that has got your back?](javascript:void\(0\))
No matter what your needs are: whether individual or corporate, savings or current, investment or loan, we have got it covered.
#### [Do you think you can add value to our existing team?](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/)
We are always on the look-out for self-motivated individuals, who are true team players and can make a positive difference.
![](https://www.eagleflightmfb.ng/images/efmb_ndpr_audit.jpg)
